title: epipactis helleborine subsp. aspromontana
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. aspromontana is a subspecies of the Helleborine orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing antioxidant properties. Epipactis helleborine subsp. aspromontana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
